title: AN ACT TO CONVERT THE SITIO OF DIPTAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BASCO, PROVINCE OF BATANES, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF SAN ANTONIO DE PADUA OF SAID MUNICIPALITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3523 / 51 OG No. 8, 3882 (August, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1332, June 16, 1955 ]

AN ACT TO CONVERT THE SITIO OF DIPTAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BASCO, PROVINCE OF BATANES, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF SAN ANTONIO DE PADUA OF SAID MUNICIPALITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION. 1. The sitio of Diptan, in the Municipality of Province of Batanes, is hereby converted into a rrio to be known as the barrio of San Antonio de Padua said municipality.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1955.
